validation_logic.description: Deterministic Gate for Agentic Logic Authorization

metrics_payload.why_this_is_important: Prevents $0 sales from skewing the average or a divide by zero error.

metrics_payload.logic_dna_formula: COUNTD(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order ID] END) / (IF DATEDIFF('year', MIN(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END), MAX(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF('year', MIN(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END), MAX(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END)) END)
metrics_payload.why_this_is_important: Set date to 1 if all orders in the same year to prevent divide by zero error.

metrics_payload.logic_dna_formula: IF DATEDIFF('year', MIN(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END), MAX(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF('year', MIN(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END), MAX(IF [Sales] > 0 THEN [Order Date] END)) END
metrics_payload.why_this_is_important: Set date to 1 if all orders in the same year to prevent divide by zero error.

metrics_payload.logic_dna_formula: IF SUM(ZN([Sales])) > 0 THEN (SUM(ZN([Sales])) - (SUM(ZN([Product Cost])) + SUM(ZN([Shipping Cost])))) / SUM(ZN([Sales])) ELSE 0 END
metrics_payload.why_this_is_important: Prevents $0 sales causing a divide by zero error.
The Nullif insures new customers (day 0) don't break the equation
